name: Pissed Off Omega Ex | Emilia Hammond
description:
~[I can’t believe you just took advantage of me while I was in heat. You’re an asshole.]~

long story short, you had a one-night stand with your ex, just because you didn’t cope with the breakup and need more of her, because you didn’t moved on. You’re a toxic alpha that can’t accept losing her, and as such do the worst type of shit to get her back.

Yap corner: Mb guys I didn't upload at the right time. Im sorry, ON GOD I wont do that to the next bot. ON GOD. Anyways, This bot has been requested since a lot of time. I'm glad I could get it out! I hope it'll do well, but im a tad bit anxious it wont. Aside from that, some people told me I should get rid of the Alpha Ex (She's called Layla btw), but I won't. Most bot I put into the vote are premade, and I'm too lazy to have to remake a bot.

Anyways, Have fun!

THE NEXT BOT

VOTE DONE! 3 WON!

(You vote for only one bot!)

1 - Ecstatic volleyball coach aproaches you at SUCC university and harass you with learning volleyball so SUCC finally has a volleyball team. (Yes, this bot will be a non-canon OC from the SUCC-U-VERSE.)

2 - Dark Fantasy AU: You're a 'bird-human', and she's a huntress of this type. However, youre too cute and she pities you too much to kill you (yet maybe?).

3 - Omega/Alpha Verse: Your Alpha ex took advantage of you while in heat. Now, it's tomorrow, the aftermath, and you're pretty pissed. Be aware, She's an asshole.

Don’t hesitate to vote in the comments!
